arts.ttl: Arsenal showdown is ‘a night that’s made for Real Madrid’
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham is ready to make history when Real Madrid entertain Arsenal in the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final tie. The Gunners stunned the 15-time winners in the opening leg, winning 3-0 at the Emirates Stadium to put themselves in a terrific position to reach the semi-finals. Real have done just about all […] The post Arsenal showdown is ‘a night that’s made for Real Madrid’ first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: 'Really big impact': Pedro Neto says Tottenham have a £22m player in their ranks who's 'really skilful'
arts.sum: Liverpool and Tottenham Hotspur are two of the Premier League’s biggest clubs, though they’ve had different fortunes in recent years. It wasn’t that long ago...

arts.ttl: Thomas Partey decision made as £32m man drops out: Arsenal predicted starting XI v Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arsenal are set for the biggest game of their season so far as they lock horns with Real Madrid in Wednesday night’s Champions League quarter-final...

arts.ttl: Arteta: Arsenal have no fear of Real Madrid as Raya insists: 'We will play to win'
arts.sum: Arsenal have no fear of facing Real Madrid at the Bernabeu and will play to win the game despite already holding a 3-0 advantage from the first leg, according to Mikel Arteta.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe ban confirmed on eve of Arsenal clash after Real Madrid star's sickening tackle
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe has been dealt a blow on the eve of Real Madrid's Champions League second leg clash with Arsenal after being handed a suspension by La Liga chiefs

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Mikel Arteta confirms key double injury boost for Real Madrid showdown
arts.sum: Gunners bolstered for huge Champions League quarter-final second leg, though one player has stayed at home

arts.ttl: Real Madrid eye Mbappe repeat as €70m bid prepared
arts.sum: If Real Madrid are able to finalise an agreement to sign Mendes this year, he would become the second PSG player to move to the Santiago Bernabeu in the last two summer windows - following Kylian Mbappe ’s switch in 2024. However, the Portugal star signed a new four-year contract at PSG in February and the Parisians are therefore unlikely to sanction an exit unless Real Madrid submit an offer that far exceeds his Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) of €60m.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sends message to Arsenal stars after Carlo Ancelotti makes 'balls' jibe
arts.sum: Real Madrid will look to overturn a 3-0 deficit as they take on Arsenal in the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final with Mikel Arteta urging his stars to make history

arts.ttl: Team News: Real Madrid vs. Arsenal injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash between Real Madrid and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Arsenal: Vinicius Junior out to emulate Cristiano Ronaldo, Karim Benzema, Raul feat on Wednesday
arts.sum: Vincius Junior has the chance to emulate a feat only achieved by Cristiano Ronaldo, Karim Benzema and Raul when Real Madrid face Arsenal at the Bernabeu on Wednesday.
